TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Dai-ni ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 173 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 166 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 90%, Cou 2%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 2%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dai-ni hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Dai-ni hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Dai-ni hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Dai-ni hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Dai-ni hya' ga Sʉhlʉnganʉ. tay mkyahu' na Dai-ni hya' ga Ciusinlun. tay 'llaw na Dai-ni hya' ga Husida. rekisi alang Damayan ga pzyang qalang nqu bunun. kayal tuqi qsya' kyokay qalang Dai-ni ga maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *ai-ni ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕ*ħl*ŋan*. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun. taj ʔllaw na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa ħus~ɕi*a. rekis~ɕi alaŋ *amajan ɣa pzjaŋ qalaŋ nqu βunun. kajal tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ kjokaj qalaŋ *ai-ni ɣa maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Dai-ni ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 173 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 166 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 90%, Cou 2%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 2%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dai-ni hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Dai-ni hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Dai-ni hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Dai-ni hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Dai-ni hya' ga Sʉhlʉnganʉ. tay mkyahu' na Dai-ni hya' ga Ciusinlun. tay 'llaw na Dai-ni hya' ga Husida. rekisi alang Damayan ga pzyang qalang nqu bunun. kayal tuqi qsya' kyokay qalang Dai-ni ga maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *ai-ni ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕ*ħl*ŋan*. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun. taj ʔllaw na *ai-ni ħjaʔ ɣa ħus~ɕi*a. rekis~ɕi alaŋ *amajan ɣa pzjaŋ qalaŋ nqu βunun. kajal tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ kjokaj qalaŋ *ai-ni ɣa maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
